# STRAT.058 ? Leverage Points (Meadows)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** systems_thinking_applied
**Domain:** SYSTEMS_THINKING_APPLIED
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
12 leverage points; paradigm most powerful; system structure; feedback loops; information flows; goals; parameters least powerful

## Application
Identify leverage points; intervene at high-leverage points; change paradigms; adjust feedback; improve information flow; structural change

## Key Values
- Leverage awareness
- Structural intervention
- Paradigm shift
- Feedback design
- System change
